description_long: This sculpture depicts a standing male figure dressed in historical military attire, including a cap, long coat, and boots. The figure stands with one foot elevated on a cylindrical object, possibly a cannon or drum, and holds a rifle in one hand while raising an olive branch or laurel in the other. The facial features and clothing details are finely rendered, with a sash and belt visible around the waist. The base is circular and solid, supporting the figure in a dynamic, triumphant pose. The overall finish is monochromatic, suggesting it is cast from a single material, likely stone or metal. The sculpture exudes a sense of commemoration or victory, typical of public monuments.
description: A detailed sculpture of a historical soldier holding a rifle and raising an olive branch, standing atop a cylindrical base. The figure is dressed in period military attire and posed in a triumphant stance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the soldier's face, raised arm with olive branch, and rifle held at his side, with one foot on a cylindrical object.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the back of the uniform, the rifle extending behind, and the cylindrical base supporting the figure.
description_view_2: Back-left view showing the draping of the coat, the back of the cap, and the cylindrical object underfoot.
description_view_3: Front-right view emphasizing the facial expression, the raised arm with olive branch, and the full length of the rifle.
attribute_subject_matter: historical military figure holding a rifle and olive branch
attribute_location_context: No visible context; background is isolated and does not indicate installation environment.
